flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Santa Fe Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Santa Fe Community College rose 57% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1k → 3.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Santa Fe Community College rose 34% between 2006 and 2009 (6.5% → 8.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Santa Fe Community College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $4.1k).
